<!-- generated: 2026-05-30 / uoink v3.3 -->
# Uoink

> Uoink keeps the videos, podcasts, and articles creators and AI developers study on their own disk, then hands them to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or a local MCP agent as a cited corpus.

## Install

- [Install Uoink](https://uoink.app/install): Windows helper, browser extension, macOS status.
- [How it works](https://uoink.app/how-it-works): capture -> library -> workspace -> iterate -> distribute.

## Product

- [Features](https://uoink.app/features): complete feature index with 28 feature pages.
- [Sources](https://uoink.app/sources): YouTube, X video, podcasts, articles, Reddit, and newsletter source cards.
- [YouTube capture](https://uoink.app/sources/youtube): save a YouTube video to your disk as a timestamped transcript, screenshots, and comments, then chat with it in Claude or ChatGPT.
- [Uoink vs NotebookLM](https://uoink.app/compare/notebooklm): the local, open-source NotebookLM alternative — sources on your disk, agent-callable over MCP.
- [Creators](https://uoink.app/creators): creator workflow from source capture to Writing Studio to attribution.
- [Developers](https://uoink.app/developers): local MCP setup, config snippets, and tool catalog.
- [Feature manifest](https://uoink.app/api/features-manifest): dashboard and agent-readable feature URLs.
- [Field notes](https://uoink.app/blog): launch articles for YouTube hook types, local-first architecture, MCP agents, Writing Studio, and universal page capture.
- [RSS](https://uoink.app/blog/rss.xml): article feed for crawlers and feed readers.
- [Twitter video](https://uoink.app/twitter): X/Twitter video capture, creator credit, and Writing Studio handoff.
- [Podcast source page](https://uoink.app/sources/podcasts): RSS feeds, local Whisper transcription, speaker diarization.
- [Privacy](https://uoink.app/privacy): no account, no Uoink cloud, no telemetry.

## Agents and MCP

- [Developers](https://uoink.app/developers): Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, Continue, ChatGPT Desktop setup.
- [Agents](https://uoink.app/agents): legacy agent setup page.
- [MCP](https://uoink.app/mcp): server metadata, transport notes, and the 63 local tool names.
- [MCP manifest JSON](https://uoink.app/mcp/manifest.json): machine-readable server manifest with all 63 tools.

## Trust

- [About + public downloads](https://uoink.app/about): total GitHub release downloads and no user tracking note.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ryanbiddy/uoink): source, releases, MIT license.
- [X @uoinkapp](https://www.twitter.com/uoinkapp): official Uoink account.
- [Email hi@uoink.app](mailto:hi@uoink.app): product contact.
- [Changelog](https://uoink.app/changelog): shipped and in-flight work.
- [Terms](https://uoink.app/terms): short legal notes.
